pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 language features, failing to utilize or validate against Java 21 syntax and APIs, which is the primary goal of the migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jaxws-rt dependency to provide JAX-WS APIs removed from the JDK module path in Java 11+.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAX-WS APIs (javax.xml.ws) were removed from the standard JDK starting with Java 11. Without this dependency, code using JAX-WS will fail to compile or throw NoClassDefFoundError at runtime on Java 21.
